motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def validSequence(self, word1: str, word2: str) -> List[int]:
    n = len(word2)
    dp = [False] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        for j in range(i):
            if word1[j] != word2[i - 1]:
                dp[i] = True
                break
    return dp

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
